---
title: "Idea template"
status: "seed | developing | active | paused | archived"
visibility: "private | shareable | public"
maturity: "1-5"
tags:
  - template
created: "YYYY-MM-DD"
updated: "YYYY-MM-DD"
related:
  - example-related-idea
---

# Front matter

Copy this front matter into a new idea page and replace the placeholder values.

```yaml
---
title:
status: seed | developing | active | paused | archived
visibility: private | shareable | public
maturity: 1-5
tags:
  -
created:
updated:
related:
  -
---
```

# Core idea

What is the simplest version of the idea?

# Why it matters

Why would this matter for theory, methods, practice, students, collaborators, or the public?

# Research question

What specific question could this idea answer?

# Possible study design

What design, sample, comparison, intervention, or analysis could test the idea?

# Measures / data

What measures, datasets, materials, or observations would be needed?

# Collaborators / students

Who might be a good fit for this idea, and what could they contribute?

# Risks / limitations

What could make the idea weak, infeasible, ethically complicated, or less interesting than it first appears?

# Next action

What is the smallest useful next step?

# Related ideas

What other notes, projects, papers, or constructs does this connect to?
